name: Returning user logs in via SMS OTP
description: User enters their phone, receives a 6-digit code, enters it, and lands back on the page they were trying to reach. Edge cases: wrong code, expired code, resend.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Logged out a week ago. Trying to get back in to send a quote.

preconditions: User is unauthenticated; tried to access /quotes and was bounced to login

steps.expect: Validation accepts variations: '555-0123', '(555) 0123', '+1 5550123'; submit advances to /verify
Code arrives in <30s; code length and format match what the input expects
Inline error 'That code didn't match — try again' without clearing the field unnecessarily
Resend button is throttled (e.g. 30s cooldown shown as a countdown)
Logs in; lands on /quotes (the page they originally tried), not /dashboard

evaluationCriteria.check: OTP input is 6 separate boxes or one auto-advancing box — not a long bare text field
iOS auto-fills the SMS code; Android one-tap auto-fills via SMS retriever where supported
Codes expire after a short window (e.g. 10 min); after N wrong attempts, user is locked out with a helpful message
OTP boxes are inputs with autocomplete='one-time-code'; error messages associated via aria-describedby
